sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79893" key="parwpi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρωπίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79893.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman's mask</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
